title: Claude Cowork: The #1 Thing To Know
summary: Jeff Su advises that Claude Cowork requires outcome-first prompting language rather than the task-first approach used for Claude Chat. With Cowork, users should describe the desired end result and let the system determine the approach, enabling more automated task completion compared to Chat's advisory-based interaction model.
